mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) FROM sys_log sl INNER JOIN student s ON sl.user_id = s.user_id WHERE -- 使用 >= 和 < 来避免 XML 解析错误 sl.add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND sl.add_datetime < (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

SELECT sl.add_datetime::date as date, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) as visitorCount FROM sys_log sl INNER JOIN student s ON sl.user_id = s.user_id WHERE sl.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY sl.add_datetime::date ORDER BY date ASC

WITH time_diffs AS ( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM add_datetime) AS add_datetime_epoch, LAG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM add_datetime)) OVER (ORDER BY add_datetime) AS prev_datetime_epoch FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND add_datetime < (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day') ), valid_sessions AS ( SELECT ABS(add_datetime_epoch - prev_datetime_epoch) AS diff_seconds FROM time_diffs WHERE prev_datetime_epoch IS NOT NULL ) SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) *60 FROM valid_sessions WHERE diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65
SELECT DATE(add_datetime) as date, SUM(duration_minutes) as totalDuration FROM learing_log WHERE add_datetime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(add_datetime) ORDER BY date
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM student_reading_log WHERE add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND add_datetime < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT DATE(add_datetime) as date, COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) as activeUserCount FROM student_reading_log WHERE add_datetime BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(add_datetime) ORDER BY date

WITH time_epochs AS ( -- 步骤 1: 将所有 add_datetime 直接转换为 epoch 秒。 -- 然后使用 LAG 函数获取上一条记录的 epoch 秒。 SELECT add_datetime, -- 将原始时间戳传递下去，用于最终的分组 EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM add_datetime::TIMESTAMP) AS current_epoch, LAG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM add_datetime::TIMESTAMP), 1) OVER (ORDER BY add_datetime) AS prev_epoch FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= #{startTime} AND add_datetime < #{endTime} ), session_identifiers AS ( -- 步骤 2: 在数字层面计算时间差，并识别新会话的开始。 -- 如果 prev_epoch 为 NULL (即第一行)，COALESCE 会使其差值为0。 SELECT add_datetime, CASE WHEN (current_epoch - COALESCE(prev_epoch, current_epoch)) > 1800 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_new_session FROM time_epochs ), session_groups AS ( -- 步骤 3: 为每个连续的学习会话分配一个唯一的ID。 SELECT add_datetime, SUM(is_new_session) OVER (ORDER BY add_datetime) AS session_id FROM session_identifiers ) -- 步骤 4: 按 session_id 分组，计算每个会话的持续时间，然后求和。 SELECT COALESCE(SUM(session_duration_seconds), 0)::BIGINT FROM ( SELECT session_id, -- 直接用最大 epoch 减去最小 epoch，得到每个会话的秒数 EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX(add_datetime)::TIMESTAMP) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MIN(add_datetime)::TIMESTAMP) AS session_duration_seconds FROM session_groups GROUP BY session_id ) AS session_durations
SELECT tc.classification_name as typeName, COUNT(t.id) as textbookCount FROM textbook_classification tc LEFT JOIN textbook t ON tc.id = t.classification GROUP BY tc.id, tc.classification_name

SELECT '学生数量' as resourceName, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM student UNION ALL SELECT '教材数量' as resourceName, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM textbook UNION ALL SELECT '题库数量' as resourceName, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM teaching_question_bank UNION ALL SELECT '教学活动数量' as resourceName, COUNT(*) as usageCount FROM discussion_topic
